overview: A modern, high-converting tuition website for Yahya Personal Tuition Classes in Vadodara. Features a public landing page with courses, timetable, testimonials, and gallery, plus a student management system with attendance tracking, assignments, and test results. Includes an AI chatbot for FAQs and lead collection, WhatsApp integration, and a protected admin panel.
features: Public landing page with hero banner, courses & fees, timetable, testimonials, and gallery
Student login with dashboard showing attendance, assignments, and test results
Admin panel to manage students, attendance, assignments, tests, and gallery
AI chatbot (Yahya AI Assistant) for FAQs, lead collection, and demo class suggestions
Floating WhatsApp button with pre-filled message
Responsive blue & white design with sticky navbar
SEO optimized for Vadodara tuition keywords
